source: IndusInd Bank credit card catalog (manual JSON)

cards.ai_best_for: High spenders who can unlock milestone-based rewards and frequent travelers
cards.ai_cons: Low base reward rate initially, rewards depend heavily on annual spend milestones
cards.ai_not_ideal_for: Low spenders or users looking for simple flat cashback cards
cards.ai_pros: Lifetime free card, strong milestone rewards, lounge access, low forex markup
key_benefits: Lifetime free credit card (no joining or annual fee)
Earn up to 6 reward points per ₹100 based on annual spends
1 reward point per ₹100 base earning rate
1 RP = ₹0.40 cash value or convertible to airmiles
2 international lounge visits per year (Priority Pass)
cards.lounge_access: 2 international per year + 2 domestic per quarter

reward_conversion.description: 1 RP = ₹0.40 (cash), 4 RP = 1 KrisFlyer mile; up to 6X rewards on high spends

cards.welcome_offer: No specific welcome bonus (lifetime free benefit)
cards.reward_rate: Up to ~2.4% on milestone spends, ~0.4% base reward rate
